---
title: "modelling 2.0"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
```
working on the raw egg size measurements for each individual egg


```{r}
raw_egg_sizes <- read.csv(here("data", "clean data", "raw egg sizes.csv"))
```


```{r}
#this is what I am aiming for in the end

lm1 <- lmer(area ~ pupal_treatment + larval_treatment + weight + (1|clutchID), data = raw_egg_sizes)

summary(lm1)

anova(lm1)

confint(lm1)
```
